hacker_news.title: Show HN: Archon-memory-core – agent memory that resolves contradictions
hacker_news.author: Divergence42
hacker_news.summary: Open-source memory layer for agents. AMB v2.3 preregistered benchmark: 99.2% top-1 vs 0% for every non-retriever baseline. pip install archon-memory-core.

linked_context.page_title: archon-memory-core — resolves contradictions, doesn't compound them
linked_context.page_description: Open-source memory layer for agents. AMB v2.3 preregistered benchmark: 99.2% top-1 vs 0% for every non-retriever baseline. pip install archon-memory-core.
linked_context.page_excerpt:
Python library · Apache 2.0 · pip install archon-memory-core

When a user changes their mind — "My dog's name is Max," then next week "actually it's Milo" — standard retrievers keep both facts and return whichever embedding scores higher. The agent contradicts itself. AMB v2.3 injects this class of contradictory fact daily across a simulated ninety-day horizon and measures which memory systems resolve the contradiction, and which drown in it.

AMB v2.3 injects semantically confusable distractors alongside every query. Top-1 accuracy is the primary metric — it matches what a real LLM does when generating from retrieved context. Every adapter runs under a real token budget with FIFO eviction. No "unlimited context" fakery.

hacker_news.title: LemmaScript: A Verification Toolchain for TypeScript via Dafny
hacker_news.author: namin
hacker_news.summary: LemmaScript compiles TypeScript to Dafny (or Lean) for verification, keeping the executable pipeline unchanged while adding a complementary path that certifies correctness.

linked_context.page_title: LemmaScript: A Verification Toolchain for TypeScript via Dafny
linked_context.page_description: LemmaScript compiles TypeScript to Dafny (or Lean) for verification, keeping the executable pipeline unchanged while adding a complementary path that certifies correctness.
linked_context.page_excerpt:
When verifying code, we should strive for as close a relationship between the verified model and the code that executes. We have been exploring one way to achieve this in the context of web apps with dafny-replay and lemmafit . The idea there is to start with code in the Dafny verification-aware programming language, compile it to JavaScript, then hook the React frontend to use the compiled log...

While this works quite well, especially for greenfield projects, we ran into issues that made us want to explore a different approach:

In response to these challenges, we set out to create LemmaScript : it compiles TypeScript to Dafny (or Lean) for the sole purpose of having a model derived from the code upon which properties can be verified. The advantage is that the executable pipeline doesn’t change, and the verification pipeline is a complementary path that certifies correctness.

hacker_news.author: guessmyname
hacker_news.summary:
Ikigai ( 生き甲斐 , lit. ' a reason for being ' ) is a Japanese concept of an individual's definition of the meaning of their life . [ 1 ]

Ikigai can be having a sense of purpose in life, [ 2 ] [ 3 ] as well as being a source of motivation. [ 4 ] According to a study by Michiko Kumano, feeling ikigai as described in Japanese is usually the sense of accomplishment and fulfillment that follows when people pursue their passions. [ 5 ] Activities that generate the feeling of ikigai are not imposed on an individual; they are perceived...

According to Japanese psychologist Katsuya Inoue, ikigai is a concept that consists of two aspects: "sources or objects that bring value or meaning to life" and "a feeling that one's life has value or meaning because of the existence of its source or object". linked_context.page_description: Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.
linked_context.page_excerpt:
In order to inform the public about the economic changes we’re observing with AI, our Economic Index shares what work Claude is being asked to do, and in which jobs Claude is doing the largest share of tasks. To date, however, we’ve lacked information on how these usage patterns map onto people’s thoughts and impressions of AI.

Our recent survey study with 81,000 Claude users provides a way to connect people’s economic concerns with what we’ve quantified in Claude traffic.

The survey asked people about their visions and fears around advances in AI. Many of the thoughts that people shared touched on economic topics. We learned that many people fear job displacement—though they also feel more productive and empowered at work. In some cases, AI has enabled them to start businesses, or given them time for more important things; in others, AI feels stifling, or impose...

named_hotspots.name: TrendRadar
named_hotspots.what_happened: 一个名为TrendRadar的开源项目在GitHub上趋势飙升，今日新增星标932个，总星标数达54389，引发广泛关注。该项目定位为AI驱动的舆情与趋势监控工具。
named_hotspots.core_details: TrendRadar是一个基于Python开发的开源工具，旨在通过AI技术解决信息过载问题。其核心功能包括：聚合多平台热点与RSS订阅源；支持关键词精准筛选；利用AI进行新闻智能筛选、翻译和分析，并生成简报直接推送至手机。项目支持Docker部署，允许数据在本地或云端自持。它集成了微信、飞书、钉钉、Telegram、邮件、ntfy、bark、slack等多种通知渠道，并能接入MCP架构，以赋能更深入的AI自然语言对话分析、情感洞察与趋势预测。
named_hotspots.ai_take: 该项目将AI作为核心处理引擎，用于信息过滤、翻译、摘要生成及趋势分析，体现了AI在信息处理和决策支持领域的工具化应用。其支持接入MCP架构，进一步扩展了AI在复杂语义理解和预测分析方面的潜力。

source_briefs.item_name: Claude Code for the Outer Loop: An AI SRE Playbook
source_briefs.content_summary: 文章探讨了如何将Claude Code等AI编码智能体应用于SRE（站点可靠性工程）的“外循环”运维工作流，以减轻值班工程师的上下文加载负担。具体提出了五个可立即运行的工作流：事件分类、操作手册执行、事后分析、SLO（服务水平目标）调查和值班交接。文章指出，当前运维工作（如事件响应）在收集上下文信息上耗费大量时间，而AI智能体有望通过集成工具访问权限和审计保障的基础设施来改变这一现状。
source_briefs.ai_comment: 这标志着AI正从辅助代码编写的‘内循环’向更复杂的系统性运维‘外循环’渗透，是AI提升IT运营效率和可靠性的关键一步。

source_briefs.item_name: What 81000 Claude users said about the economics of AI
source_briefs.content_summary: Anthropic发布了一项基于81,000名Claude用户的调查研究，旨在连接AI使用模式与人们对AI的经济担忧。调查发现，许多用户害怕工作被取代，但同时也在工作中感到生产力提升和更有能力。AI帮助一些人创业或腾出时间做更重要的事，但也让另一些人感到压抑或带来额外负担。研究还指出，最高薪和最低薪职业的用户报告了最大的生产力提升，这通常来自于工作范围的扩大。
source_briefs.ai_comment: 该调查揭示了AI对劳动力市场影响的复杂性：在提升个体生产力的同时，也加剧了对就业结构和收入不平等的担忧，为政策制定和企业部署提供了重要参考。

source_briefs.item_name: Ping-Pong Robot Stuns World by Defeating Elite Human Players [video]

source_briefs.item_name: Kalshi suspends, fines 3 congressional candidates in 'insider trading' enforcement actions - CNBC

source_briefs.ai_comment: 此事件凸显了预测市场在政治领域的应用及其面临的监管与伦理挑战，特别是当参与者拥有可能影响结果的非公开信息时。

source_briefs.item_name: Trump's redistricting war leaves Republicans worse off - Axios
source_briefs.content_summary: 报道指出，特朗普在重划选区上的策略使共和党处境更糟。具体而言，弗吉尼亚州的选区重划选举胜利鼓舞了国会民主党人，而共和党则在失利后 navigating ‘regret’ and recriminations（应对‘懊悔’和相互指责）。
source_briefs.ai_comment: 这反映了美国政治中选区重划作为关键战略工具的重要性，以及其可能对政党力量对比产生的深远影响。

source_briefs.item_name: Iran fires on 2 ships in Strait of Hormuz after Trump extends ceasefire - Fox News
source_briefs.content_summary: 在特朗普延长停火协议后，伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡向两艘船只开火。后续报道称伊朗扣押了船只，而白宫则淡化了伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡附近的袭击，称其“并非交易破坏者”。
source_briefs.ai_comment: 这一事件加剧了关键海运通道的紧张局势，并考验着大国外交与危机管理能力，凸显了地缘政治风险对全球贸易的持续影响。

summary.closing_note: 今日热点凸显了AI开源生态的活力，项目多聚焦于解决实际痛点（如信息过载、代码上下文限制、隐私监控、安全测试），并通过标准化协议（如MCP）和模块化设计提升可扩展性。值得关注的是，非视觉感知（RuView）和全自动内容生成（Pixelle-Video）等方向可能预示着新的技术范式。开发者可依据自身需求，关注这些项目的实际部署案例与社区持续维护情况，以评估其长期价值。
